title: Dar-Benn
content:
{{CharHub|Dar-Benn|Dar-Benn}} {{Character |image = Dar-Benn Promo.jpg |real name = Dar-Benn |species = [[Kree]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|KRE}} |DOD = [[2026|Late 2026]]{{Ref|TM}} |gender = Female |title = Supremor of the [[Kree Empire]]{{Ref|TMoTM}} |affiliation = {{Affiliation|STAR}} (formerly)
[[Accusers]] (formerly) |movie = ''[[The Marvels]]'' |actor = [[Zawe Ashton]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|Captain Marvel, the annihilator. You took [[Hala|everything]] from me. And now I'm returning the favor.|Dar-Benn to [[Captain Marvel]]|The Marvels}} Supremor '''Dar-Benn''' was a revolutionary [[Kree]] warrior and former [[Accusers|Accuser]] of the [[Kree Empire]]. Formerly a member of [[Starforce]], she blamed [[Captain Marvel]] for inciting a [[Kree Civil War|long civil war]] on [[Hala]], which led to the planet's desolation. In [[2026]], after discovering a [[Quantum Bands|Quantum Band]] on [[MB-418]], Dar-Benn tore apart [[Universal Neural Teleportation Network|jump points]] in space to extract natural resources from various planets to restore her homeworld, targeting [[Tarnax IV]], [[Aladna]], and [[Earth]]. In the process, Dar-Benn ruined diplomatic peace talks between the Kree and the [[Skrulls]]. Before Dar-Benn could siphon energy from the Earth's [[Sun]] to reignite [[Pama]], she faced intervention from Captain Marvel, [[Monica Rambeau]] and [[Ms. Marvel]]. In a bid to harness the combined power of two Quantum Bands, Dar-Benn spitefully created a multiversal wormhole, but the cosmic energy from the two bands proved too destructive and disintegrated her. ==Biography== {{MD|Dar-Benn (Earth-199999)}} ===Early Life=== ====Defending Hala==== [[File:Young Dar-Benn.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn sees the [[Destruction of the Supreme Intelligence|attack]]]] {{Quote|After my [[Supreme Intelligence|predecessor]] was [[Destruction of the Supreme Intelligence|destroyed]]... heretics rose up to fill the void. The [[Kree Civil War|Civil War]] has polluted our skies. My people cannot breathe. Our [[Pama|sun]] is dying. [[Hala]] is out of time.|Dar-Benn|The Marvels}} Dar-Benn was a member of the famous [[Kree]] [[Starforce]] and lived on [[Hala]], which she believed to be beautiful. On one fateful day, Dar-Benn was in the city when she saw [[Captain Marvel]] arrive and blast through the primary building. Dar-Benn arrived to defend the Kree and saw Danvers plowing through other guards. Danvers then saw Dar-Benn and blasted the ceiling, causing rubble to fall on her. Danvers claimed she was setting them free and soon destroyed the [[Supreme Intelligence]]. [[File:Dar-Benn sees the Annihilator.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn faces [[Captain Marvel]]]] This action caused heretics to fill the void of Hala, leading to a [[Kree Civil War]] that destroyed the planet and its resources. This rid the planet of its air, water and even [[Pama]]. Dar-Benn grew up with a vengeance towards Captain Marvel, referring to her as "The Annihilator". Eventually, Dar-Benn earned enough trust to become the Supremor. With her leadership, she returned Hala to peace and glory in all but their resources.{{Ref|TM}} ===[[Restoration of Hala|Restoring Hala]]=== ====[[Search for the Quantum Bands]]==== [[File:Dar-Benn Universal Weapon.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn destroys the relic]] {{Quote|There’s only [[Quantum Bands|one]] here. They were forged as a pair.|Dar-Benn|The Marvels}} As [[Hala]]'s atmosphere became even more unstable, Dar-Benn rounded up troops and they flew by [[Pama]] before using the [[Universal Neural Teleportation Network]] to get to [[MB-418]] where she believed the [[Quantum Bands]] were. These bands would be able to open up the jump points on various planets to steal their resources to save Hala. Once on MB-418, Dar-Benn had her [[Accusers]] mine through the surface to get the box containing the bands. [[File:Like Where?.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn asks where the other [[Quantum Bands|band]] is]] Dar-Benn approached the statue and tapped it once with her [[Universal Weapon]], causing it to crumple and reveal its internal resources. In preparation of obtaining the bands, Dar-Benn rolled up her sleeves and got down, sifting through the rubble, finding a band. She admired the band and placed it on herself, feeling the rush of energy inside her. satisfied, Dar-Benn looked for the second one, only to be annoyed that there was only one there. [[Ty-Rone]] assured her they would keep looking.{{Ref|TM}} ====Peace Talks==== [[File:Dar-Benn Peace Treaty.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn discusses a deal with [[Dro'ge]]]] {{Quote|I hope we can rebuild together. So much so that I’m willing to put our [[Kree-Skrull War|ancient animosities]] behind us. And give you a chance to protect your people. To stop running. The [[Skrull]] will take their rightful place in the [[Kree Empire]]. And I will aid in their relocation.|Dar-Benn to [[Dro'ge]]|The Marvels}} With only one [[Quantum Bands|Quantum Band]], Dar-Benn could still open up the [[Universal Neural Teleportation Network]]. However, only one band made it unstable. Therefore, she went to [[Tarnax IV]] to talk to Emperor [[Dro'ge]] of the [[Skrulls]]. She tried to negotiate a new peace treaty. Once Dro'ge read it, he got disappointed, saying that was not what they agreed upon. He complained about the Skrulls being scattered across the galaxy. Dar-Benn told him that she out of all people knew how hard that would be. [[File:Dar-Benn Threatens.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn threatens the [[Skrulls]]]] Dar-Benn explained that once the [[Supreme Intelligence]] was destroyed, heretics rose up to fill the void. This caused a [[Kree Civil War]] that ultimately led to many problems on [[Hala]]. Since Hala was dying, Dar-Benn explained that she hoped they could rebuild together. Dar-Benn then announced that the Skrulls would take their place in the [[Kree Empire]] and Dar-Benn would aid in their relocation off Tarnax. Dar-Benn soon revealed she was going to strip Tarnax of its atmosphere, giving the Skrulls the chance to get off.{{Ref|TM}} ====[[Destruction of Tarnax IV]]==== [[File:Dar-Benn and Ty-Rone.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn talks with [[Ty-Rone]]]] {{Quote|The [[Kree]] came [[Tarnax IV|here]] hopeful that we could build a covenant of peace. But then you sic [[Captain Marvel|the Annihilator]] on us. Like we’re vermin. Once again, the [[Skrull]] have betrayed the Kree.|Dar-Benn to the [[Skrulls]]|The Marvels}} Dar-Benn returned to the [[Accuser Warship]] only to see two outcasts, [[Monica Rambeau]] and [[Ms. Marvel]]. [[Ty-Rone]] explained that they were associates of [[Captain Marvel]], which angered Dar-Benn. With "The Annihilator" upon them, Dar-Benn wanted to use the [[Quantum Bands|band]]. However, Ty-Rone advised against it, saying that without the other one, it was still unstable. Since it still worked even with the trouble, Dar-Benn decided to use it. [[File:Dar-Benn Quantum Band.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn wears the [[Quantum Bands|Quantum Band]]]] She then walked over to the band and put it on. Ty-Rone asked what to do with Rambeau and Khan, so Dar-Benn charged up her [[Universal Weapon]] and shot it at the two. However, The Annihilator appeared and absorbed the blasts. Captain Marvel then went at Dar-Benn, who defended herself. Danvers then shot a photon blast, which Dar-Benn was able to absorb with the band. She then used this new energy and charged at the enemies. She briefly scuffled with Danvers, but decided to just jump off the warship and make her way to the ground. [[File:Dar-Benn (Tarnax).png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn ridicules the [[Skrulls]]]] Now on the surface of [[Tarnax IV]], Dar-Benn stood on top of a cliff and spoke to the [[Skrulls]], saying that the [[Kree]] were hopeful to make peace. However, they called Captain Marvel and betrayed the Kree. As punishment, Dar-Benn slammed her hammer against the band, causing a jump point to open up, siphoning the air to Hala. Dar-Benn then left the Skrulls to fend for themselves.{{Ref|TM}} {{Clear}} ====Celebrating Victory==== [[File:Dar-Benn Respirator.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn tests the air]] {{Quote|We need more power than that [[Quantum Bands|band]] can provide if we’re to reignite our [[Pama|sun]]. That amount of energy... Well, it would kill you."
"If my life is the cost, so be it.|[[Ty-Rone]] and Dar-Benn|The Marvels}} On [[Hala]], Dar-Benn stood in front of the [[Kree]] and watched as the air went through the [[Universal Neural Teleportation Network]] and into the planet. She then took off her breathing mask and tested the air, finding out it was safe. She then told the others to breathe. With the first step accomplished, Dar-Benn talked about how Hala used to be before [[Captain Marvel]] destroyed it. [[File:Dar-Benn (The Marvels).png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn argues with [[Ty-Rone]]]] Dar-Benn then promised to make Hala even better than she already has, which earned cheers and chants among the population. [[Ty-Rone]] soon pulled Dar-Benn aside and told her that they would need more power then that single [[Quantum Bands|band]] would supply in order to reignite [[Pama]]. In addition, that amount of energy would sure to kill her. Dar-Benn told him she was okay with losing her life if Hala was saved. Ty-Rone wanted more time to find a solution, but Dar-Benn told him Hala was out of time.{{Ref|TM}} ====[[Attack on Aladna]]==== [[File:Dar-Benn Kree.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn faces [[Yan]]]] {{Quote|I’ve come here to pardon you for your crimes against the [[Kree Empire]]. Kneel.|Dar-Benn to [[Yan]]|The Marvels}} Finding a new place to attack, Dar-Benn decided on [[Aladna]], which was nearly 100% filled with water. In addition, it was home to [[Captain Marvel]]'s husband, Prince [[Yan]], therefore it was yet another place close to Danvers that she could destroy. They soon arrived in Aladna and made their way to the city where Dar-Benn stood in front of her [[Accusers]]. Prince Yan asked why she had come and Dar-Benn responded that she was pardoning Aladna for its crimes against the [[Kree Empire]]. [[File:Dar-Benn vs Monica.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn fights [[Monica Rambeau]]]] She then ordered Yan to kneel for it, which he refused. She then went to blast Yan with her [[Universal Weapon]] only to see this blast get absorbed by [[Monica Rambeau]] and redirected back at her, launching her back. An annoyed Dar-Benn got up as Rambeau approached and the two got caught in a fight. Dar-Benn absorbed a blast before [[Captain Marvel]] arrived to fight too. [[Ty-Rone]] passed Dar-Benn her hammer which she used to launch both Rambeau and Danvers away. [[File:Dar-Benn (Aladna).png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn prepares to leave]] Dar-Benn then menacingly walked through the battle field unharmed and made it to her ship. Once on the top of it, she yelled at her servants to go. The ship them took off. Facing the city in Aladna, Dar-Benn went to hit the [[Quantum Bands|band]] together with her [[Universal Weapon]] to cause the water to transfer to [[Hala]]. However, she was tackled by Rambeau. Dar-Benn swung and missed, allowing Rambeau to grab the band. Dar-Benn saw then and swung her hammer and pushed Rambeau back, dragging them both. [[File:Dar-Benn Mocks Danvers.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn vs. [[Captain Marvel]]]] She then hit the hammer hard with her arm, causing Rambeau to get down on one knee. Rambeau pushed back, sending shock waves from the bangle which launched them both away. Dar-Benn caught herself by planting the hammer into the ship. She then charged at Rambeau only to be met by Danvers who told her not to do this. Dar-Benn simply said she was too late. The two held each other in a stalemate until Rambeau came in and kicked Dar-Benn back. [[File:Dar-Benn absorbs Carol's powers.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn absorbs [[Captain Marvel]]'s powers]] Dar-Benn then faced the two women and Captain Marvel shot at her. Dar-Benn absorbed this with the band only to see [[Ms. Marvel]]. Dar-Benn's band started glowing and looked up to see that Khan had the second band. In shock, Dar-Benn demanded to know where Khan got the band. Khan told her her [[Aisha|great-grandmother]] had it. Dar-Benn told her to give it, but Khan ran off where Danvers returned and tackled Dar-Benn. [[File:Dar-Benn.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn on [[Aladna]]]] Dar-Benn dodged a punch and then tackled Danvers, not only holding her in a chokehold, but absorbing Danvers' energy, causing her pain. Dar-Benn then used this power and punched Danvers, making her fly hundreds of yards back. Now unopposed, Dar-Benn finally hit the hammer against the band, opening up a jump point and siphoning water to Hala. With her second mission complete, Dar-Benn left Aladna.{{Ref|TM}} {{Clear}} ====Taking the Sun==== [[File:Dar-Benn The Marvels.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn in front of the [[Sun]]]] {{Quote|[[Hala]]'s [[Pama|sun]] died because of you. Why shouldn't you repay us?|Dar-Benn to [[Captain Marvel]]|The Marvels}} Dar-Benn's final mission was to reignite [[Pama]], which she decided could be done by using [[Earth]]'s [[Sun]], yet another one of [[Captain Marvel]]'s planets. Expecting the [[Marvels]] to show up, Dar-Benn approached the Sun in her [[Accuser Warship]] and used her [[Universal Weapon]] and [[Quantum Bands|band]] to open a jump point, which started a slow process of siphoning the Sun. However, Dar-Benn knew she still needed the second band. [[File:The Marvels Trailer (9).png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn talks to [[Captain Marvel]]]] Dar-Benn patiently waited until [[Captain Marvel]] arrived. Captain Marvel tried to warn her that this act would be the end of the [[Kree]] and even the end of everything. Dar-Benn refused to listen and demanded to have the second band. Danvers simply said she was forgetting something. On cue, [[Monica Rambeau]] arrived behind her and punched Dar-Benn, making her drop her hammer. Dar-Benn angrily faced the [[Marvels]], saying it could have been so much easier. [[File:Dar-Benn Blocks Attack.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn blocks her own [[Universal Weapon]]]] Finding herself outmatched, Dar-Benn used the absorption to defend herself of a three-way attack. She held her own until [[Ms. Marvel]] took out her legs, allowing Rambeau to kick Dar-Benn away. Dar-Benn then dodged a photon blast and then blocked Danvers, who attacked with the hammer. She then absorbed a blast from Rambeau and redirected it at the Annihilator, causing the latter to drop the hammer. Dar-Benn then choked Rambeau but was stopped by Khan. [[File:Dar-Benn Handles Monica.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn vs. [[Monica Rambeau]]]] Getting overwhelmed, she was now attacked by Danvers while Rambeau jumped in with the hammer. Dar-Benn impressively caught the hammer and retook control only for Rambeau to grab it back and hit Dar-Benn, launching her away. Dar-Benn got up for another round and still held her own, knocking back both Danvers and Rambeau. She then blocked Ms. Marvel's attack and used her [[Noor]] against her, punching Khan with it. She then pinned Khan to a wall but was held back by Danvers, who caught her punch. [[File:Dar-Benn Dying.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn asks for repayment]] Danvers then held her still as Rambeau delivered a very powerful blow that knocked Dar-Benn into a wall. Dar-Benn then fell to the ground where the wall collapsed on top of her, impaling Dar-Benn with a metal shard. She screamed in pain and told Danvers she was living up to her nickname. Danvers said she did not want this, but Dar-Benn told her that death follows her. Ms. Marvel pleaded for the bangle, but Dar-Benn refused, telling Danvers that [[Pama]] died because of her and she should repay them. [[File:Dar-Benn Threatens Kamala.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn tricks the [[Marvels]]]] Rambeau agreed with this statement, saying that Danvers powers would be enough to reignite Pama and save Hala. Danvers turned to Dar-Benn and remarked "for Hala", which Dar-Benn repeated. Danvers then lifted the wall off of Dar-Benn only for Dar-Benn to turn on them. She soon had Ms. Marvel in her possession and under her hammer. Dar-Benn threatened the Marvels in killing Khan if they got near. Dar-Benn then grabbed the second bangle off Khan and put it on. [[File:Powered Dar-Benn.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dar-Benn obtains both [[Quantum Bands]]]] She immediately felt an overwhelming surge of energy as Danvers claimed she would not survive. Rambeau also tried to reason, but Dar-Benn did not listen as she prepared to hit the two bands together. Before she could do so, Danvers flew at her and tackled Dar-Benn, sending them into space while fighting each other. Dar-Benn was able to kick Danvers away and connect the bangles. Much to her pain though, the bands caused Dar-Benn to explode, just like [[Ty-Rone]] warned.{{Ref|TM}} ===Legacy=== ====Pama Reignited==== [[File:Pama and Danvers.png|{{AltFloat}}|[[Captain Marvel]] reignites [[Pama]]]] {{Quote|[[Captain Marvel|She]] went to fulfill a promise.|[[Ms. Marvel]]|The Marvels}} Dar-Benn's last act with the [[Quantum Bands]] caused a giant surge of energy that ripped a hole through space-time. In order to fix this rift, [[Monica Rambeau]] was forced to stay behind in the new world to seal the rift and prevent it from destroying everything. Once this was done, [[Captain Marvel]] stuck to her promise and flew to [[Hala]] where she went binary and flew through [[Pama]], reigniting it. Danvers then looked at her work while Hala was restored.{{Ref|TM}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Kree Physiology''': As a [[Kree]], Dar-Benn possessed various superhuman attributes. Most notably, superhuman strength, durability, agility, and an efficient healing factor. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Dar-Benn possessed superhuman strength, making her a formidable threat in a fight. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Dar-Benn's body is very resistant to physical damage, allowing her to resist great forces of impacts, as well as the photon blasts of [[Captain Marvel]]. However, she couldn't withstand the large amount of energy generated by using the two [[Quantum Bands]] together. **'''Superhuman Agility''': Dar-Benn had tremendous agility, being able to make her way around the battle field quickly. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Dar-Benn was a very skilled warrior, being able to battle for a tremendously long time. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Dar-Benn's reflexes allowed her to dodge many attacks, shots and blasts from [[Captain Marvel]], [[Monica Rambeau]] and [[Ms. Marvel]]. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Dar-Benn had a very efficient healing factor, allowing her to heal from her wounds very quickly. Immediately after [[Captain Marvel]] removed the pile of debris that stabbed her, Dar-Benn was able to quickly heal from her wound. However, if the injuries are serious enough to instantly kill her, her healing factor will not be able to save her, which is what happened when she was overloaded and obliterated by the large amount of energy generated by using the two [[Quantum Bands]] at the same time. {{Quote|Your powers only make me stronger.|Dar-Benn to [[Captain Marvel]]|The Marvels}} *'''[[Quantum Bands]] Capabilities''': In addition to her natural attributes as a [[Kree]], Dar-Benn gained some powers when she wore the unit of [[Quantum Bands]] that was buried in [[MB-418]]. **'''Energy Projection''': Dar-Benn was able to direct the absorbed energy by the bangle and project energy blasts. Dar-Benn was able to direct the absorbed energy of [[Captain Marvel]] and [[Monica Rambeau]] attacks to attack them back with the same strength. **'''Energy Absorption''': Dar-Benn was able to absorb the energy that hit the bangle. Dar-Benn was able to absorb several energy blasts from [[Captain Marvel]] and [[Monica Rambeau]]. **'''Force-Field Armor Generation''': Dar-Benn was able to wrap her body with the energy absorbed by the bangle and using it for protection and physical reinforcement. Dar-Benn was able to use this energy to protect her body from several attacks from [[Captain Marvel]] and [[Monica Rambeau]]. **'''Physical Augmentation''': Dar-Benn was able to use the absorbed energy by the bangle to to enhance her physical abilities. Dar-Benn was able to enhance herself to the point of being able to easily overpower [[Captain Marvel]] by absorbing her photon blasts and channeling them through her body. **'''Jump Point Manipulation''': By hitting the bangle with the [[Universal Weapon]], Dar-Benn was able to open unstable [[Jump Points]] that would not close. Dar-Benn was able to open Jump Points on [[MB-418]], [[Tarnax IV]], [[Aladna]] and near [[Sun]] to steal resources and restore [[Hala]]. ===Abilities=== {{Expand}} *'''Master Combatant''': ''To be added'' *'''Hammer Mastery''': ''To be added'' *'''Expert Tactician''': ''To be added'' ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Expand}} *'''[[Universal Weapon]]''': ''To be added'' ===Other Equipment=== {{Expand}} *'''[[Quantum Bands]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Kree Empire]] **[[Supreme Intelligence]] † - Former Superior **[[Ty-Rone]] **[[Starforce]] **[[Accusers]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Kree Emperor]] - Former Superior *[[Marvels]] **[[Captain Marvel|Carol Danvers/Captain Marvel]] **[[Monica Rambeau]] **[[Ms. Marvel|Kamala Khan/Ms. Marvel]] *[[Skrulls]] **[[Dro'ge]] *[[Aladnean Royal Family]] **[[Yan]] *[[Aladnean Armed Forces]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Dar-Benn was a [[Kree]] General, who had become the Emperor of the [[Kree Empire]] by using the android version of [[w:c:marvel:Silver Surfer|Silver Surfer]] to kill [[w:c:marvel:Clumsy Foulup|Clumsy Foulup]]. *She is the fourth female main antagonist in a Marvel Cinematic Universe film, following [[Hela]], [[Ghost]] and [[Scarlet Witch]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Rashid Phoenix]] and [[Chloe Kibble]] were stunt doubles for [[Zawe Ashton]] in the role of Dar-Benn. *[[Samantha Alleyne]] was a stand-in for [[Zawe Ashton]] in the role of Dar-Benn. ==References== {{Gallery|Dar-Benn/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} {{Succession box |before = [[Kree Emperor]] |title = Supremor of the [[Kree Empire]] |current = Dar-Benn |years = [[2026]] |after = -}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/dar-benn}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:The Marvels Characters]] [[Category:Kree]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Green Eyes]] [[Category:Accusers]] [[Category:Starforce Members]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Dar-Benn]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Themselves]] [[Category:Genderbent for the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]
